seoTitle: Add a Favicon to Your GoHighLevel Funnel or Website
metaDescription: Upload and apply a favicon to your GoHighLevel funnel or website to strengthen your branding across browser tabs and bookmarks.
intro: A favicon is a small detail that makes a big difference in how professional your GoHighLevel funnel or website looks, showing up in browser tabs, bookmarks, and browser history. This tutorial covers uploading a favicon, applying it correctly, and verifying it displays across browsers.

steps.heading: Open funnel or website settings
steps.body: Navigate to the settings for the specific GoHighLevel funnel or website where you want to add a favicon.

steps.heading: Upload your favicon
steps.body: Choose and upload an image file to use as your favicon, keeping branding consistency in mind.

steps.heading: Save and publish changes
steps.body: Save your settings and publish the updated funnel or website so the favicon takes effect.

steps.heading: Verify the favicon across browsers
steps.body: Check that your favicon displays correctly in different browsers to confirm the upload was successful.

steps.heading: Troubleshoot favicon display issues
steps.body: If the favicon doesn't appear as expected, review the recommended sizes, formats, and settings covered in the tutorial.

faq.question: What image format should I use for a favicon?
faq.answer: The tutorial covers best practices for favicon sizes and image formats to ensure it displays correctly.

faq.question: Why isn't my favicon showing up after I upload it?
faq.answer: The tutorial includes troubleshooting tips for common favicon display issues, which can often relate to caching or incorrect sizing.

faq.question: Does a favicon affect SEO?
faq.answer: A favicon primarily improves branding and user experience rather than directly impacting SEO rankings, though it contributes to a more professional site.

faq.question: Can I use the same favicon across multiple funnels?
faq.answer: Yes, you can apply the same favicon image to different funnels or websites for consistent branding.

faq.question: Who is this tutorial for?
faq.answer: Agencies, marketers, business owners, web designers, freelancers, and GoHighLevel beginners.
